features.behavior: Initialize sealed delivery from versioned specification and task plan
Create or reuse Linear project and publish specification and tasks
Project task state as Todo, In Progress, In Review, Done
Enforce one active task and one feature branch per task
Dispatch and record distinct implementer, reviewer, gatekeeper, and merger identities
Return failed review to implementation and invalidate stale evidence
Deny merge without independent current-SHA evidence and Linear confirmation
Continuously monitor sealed state and report invariant violations
Merge only through GitHub required checks after gate ALLOW
Meet production chaos and volume certification thresholds
Fail readiness unless the sandbox runner is executable, SHA-256 pinned, nonce-bound, operational, and isolation-attested
Isolate simultaneous deliveries with run-scoped branches, state directories, locks, and Git worktrees
Support Claude Code, OpenCode, Kilo Code, and other runtimes through the adapter protocol
